In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], a group of [[Gerrard V Rebels|local rebels]] led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Camon Udeon]] staged an '''uprising''' on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gerrard V]], seizing the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Harazod]] and deploying a small naval [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. A [[Standard week/Legends|week]] later, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Jion Trynn]] arrived at Gerrard V. After smashing the small rebel fleet, Trynn deployed ground forces and pushed General Udeon's forces back to the [[capitol building]].<ref name="GNN3" />

Trynn offered Udeon terms of surrender, but the General refused, [[Death/Legends|shooting]] the [[Unidentified Imperial courier|courier]] and preparing for a last stand. In response, Trynn authorized the orbital bombardment of Harazod's urban center.<ref name="GNN3" />

The planet would gain its independence later on, during the [[Liberation of Gerrard V]].<ref name="RS I">[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]</ref>
